## nsc docker buildx cleanup

Unregisters Namespace Remote builders from buildx.

```
nsc docker buildx cleanup [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help           help for cleanup
      --name string    The name of the builder to clean up. (default "nsc-remote")
      --state string   If set, looks for the remote builder context in this directory.
```
